tasks.finalAnswer:
## May 2025 Counts

| Metric | Count |
|--------|------|
| **Payment intents created** | **16** |
| **Payment attempts created** | **23** |

## Why the Numbers Differ

A **payment intent** represents a single business goal — to collect payment for an order. A **payment attempt** is one request sent to a payment channel (PSP). The two numbers differ because one intent can spawn **multiple attempts** when earlier attempts fail and the system retries on another channel.

In May 2025, there were **7 more attempts than intents** (23 vs. 16), meaning 7 attempts were retries on intents whose first attempt failed. This is normal: failed attempts trigger routing to a different channel until the intent either succeeds or the retry limit is exhausted.
